subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O God, Thou Lord of all created things, and glory be unto Thee, O God, Thou Goal of all contingent beings! I beseech Thee by Thy Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا اله الکائنات و سبحانک اللهم یا مقصود الممکنات اسئلک باسمک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
